items.title: Jackery Member Sale offers 1,024Wh HomePower 1000 v2 power station + mini 100W solar panel at $549 (Reg. $999), more
items.summary: Jackery is currently having a Member Sale with up to 50% discounts on a collection of its power stations, complete with member-exclusive deals (sign-up is free), and rewards in exchange for Jackery points. One of the member-only offers is a first-time bundle of the new HomePower 1000 v2 Portable Power Station with a 100W mini solar panel for $549 shipped, which is not a unit available on Amazon yet. It would normally run you $999 at full price, with non-members paying $599, while members gain an additional $50 savings to this rate. All in all, this is a 45% markdown for $450 savings, setting the bar for future discounts down the road. Considering the standalone station is sold out after being offered at $549 in the previous sale, this deal is all the better as you are getting a solar panel for free with it. You can browse all the other deals included in this sale event below.

items.title: Loads of official Google Pixel 10 gear at clearance pricing ahead of August launch event, deals from $11
items.summary: Ahead of next month’s Google Pixel launch event, we are tracking some deep discounts on current-generation gear for folks not looking to pay full price on the new releases. Perhaps most notably, we have Pixel 10 Pro at a solid $300 off the list price, but this morning also ushered in a new all-time low on the official Google’s Pixel 10a cases from just $20 Prime shipped alongside price drops on the Pixelsnap models for the Pixel 10 lineup. Scope everything out down below.

items.title: Your wrist will thank you for scoring Logitech’s Lift ergonomic wireless mouse down at just $47 today (All-time low)
items.summary: As part of its wider sale on Logitech Mac and gaming accessories, Woot is offering the brand’s Lift wireless ergonomic mouse in the Off-White finish for $46.78 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). Be sure to enter promo code LOGITECH22 during checkout to see the discounted price. This mouse originally carried a $70 price tag and has fetched as much as $75 at Amazon in recent months. It’s currently listed for $60 there, meaning Woot has it for $13 less. Today’s deal also comes in $3 below the previous all-time low we tracked, making this a great time to pick one up if you were looking to upgrade your workstation mouse.

items.title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality

But Musk's typical bullishness seemed to be absent from the call, as the occasional trillionaire […]

items.title: Today’s Android app deals and freebies: Can You Escape, Seoul Exorcist 1111, Unbroken Soul, more
items.summary: Alongside the ongoing pre-order deals on Galaxy Z Fold 8, Fold 8 Ultra, and Flip 8 at up to $100 off with code PAYPAL, alongside FREE $200 credits, up to $1,230 off with trade-ins, we are now ready to collect all of today’s best Android game and app deals. Highlights include Can You Escape: The Collection, Seoul Exorcist 1111, This Aint Even Poker, Ya Joker, Unbroken Soul, Through the Darkest of Times, Titan Quest: Ultimate Edition, and more. Everything awaits below.

items.title: Cover all your cooking bases with Ninja’s 14-in-1 Combi multicooker while down at $180 (Reg. $250)
items.summary: Amazon is currently offering the Ninja Combi 14-in-1 Multicooker for $179.95 shipped, bringing things down from the $250 full price, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. We saw 2026 discounts through late April drop the cost to $200, while discounts since have mostly seen it falling to $180, save for the one-day drop to $160 at the start of June’s Prime Day event. You can pick it up here with a 28% markdown for $70 savings to the second-lowest price we have tracked in 2026. There’s also all of Ninja’s other appliance deals in the official Amazon storefront here that you can browse through, too.

items.title: This compact electric standing desk with drawers can free up some space for only $90 (Reg. $140)
items.summary:
HUANUO Compact Electric Standing Desk with Drawers

Buy for $90 (Reg. $140)

What we love

If you don’t need, want, or have space for a spacious standing desk, compact solutions exist. Unlike a lot of others at this price point, it actually has drawers for storage. You’ll also stand to benefit from the two-tier design that can help bring a monitor up a bit higher too.

items.title: Score a huge 72% off this Galaxy Tab at $110 with Z Fold 8/Ultra pre-orders
items.summary: The Galaxy Z Fold 8, Fold 8 Ultra, and Flip 8 are flying and you can still land $100 off with code PAYPAL as well asa FREE $200 Samsung credit that stacks on top of the $30 reserve credit. This can result in landing $300 off the new Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 or a FREE set of $250 Galaxy Buds Pro when added to the same cart as your phone pre-order, but if you’re not interested in any of that, you can also land a current-generation Galaxy Tab for as low as $110 too. Details below.

items.title: Twelve South’s CableStay keeps your USB-C cable from falling behind your desk for $21 today (All-time low)
items.summary:
Twelve South CableStay USB-C Cable & Weighted Anchor – 5-ft – Mint

Buy for $21 (Reg. $30)

What we love

This clever accessory from Twelve South pairs a 5-foot USB-C cable with a weighted desk anchor that keeps the connector from slipping behind your desk. The cable supports up to 60W charging, making it suitable for iPhones, iPads, AirPods, MacBook Air models, and other USB-C devices, while the mint finish adds a subtle pop of color.

items.title: Freshen up your office with one of these desk pads from $8.50 right now
items.summary:
Aothia 23.6-inch Leatherette Desk Pad

Buy for $8.50 (Reg. $13)

What we love

I’ve been using desk pads like this for years. I scoop them up when they’re affordable like this to freshen up the look of my office without breaking the bank. You’ll find lots of colorways on sale right now, with this black style at the lowest price of $8.50.

items.title: Bring home the stylish Govee Matter Pendant Light for kitchen islands, tables, more – now at $120
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Govee is offering the stylish Matter Pendant Light down at $119.99 shipped, which beats out the direct website, where it’s still listed for a full $150 price. We’ve mostly been seeing discounts cutting the price down to $130, $120, or $110, though since April we haven’t seen that $110 rate reappear. Prime Day in June did see it fall to $100 for the first time, but if you missed out then, you’re getting a solid 20% markdown for $30 savings to the third-lowest price we have tracked.
